name: Custom hueforge art
notes: Custom hueforge art price depends on size

name: Custom Hype Chain Necklace
notes: Bold 3D printed chain necklace with interlocking links and a custom mascot pendant. A head-turning accessory available in any color combo you can dream up!

name: Ironbite Dragon
notes: A fully poseable articulated dragon bursting with vibrant color. Flexible joints let you pose it any way you like — a standout piece for collectors and dragon fans of all ages!

name: Bat Shadow
notes: An epic 11-inch Shadow x Batman mashup that commands any display shelf. Bold detail, rich color, and serious presence — a must-have for collectors.

name: Custom  Keychains
notes: Custom keychains available also have flexi Keychain options for the fidget lovers

name: Spiky Sensory Twisty Sphere
notes: A satisfying sensory sphere with a mesmerizing twist action and spiky texture. Perfect for stress relief, focus, or just something fun to keep your hands busy!

name: Demogorgon Flexi
notes: A fully articulated Stranger Things Demogorgon with satisfying flex action. Poses, bends, and displays beautifully — the fan-favorite piece every Stranger Things lover needs!

name: Flexi Manta Ray
notes: A gorgeous flexible manta ray with a shimmering iridescent blue finish. Glides through the air, sits beautifully on a shelf, and makes a unique gift that's impossible not to love.

name: Custom Light Box
notes: A custom illuminated light box that glows beautifully on any wall. Vibrant color detail that really pops when lit — a one-of-a-kind display piece or meaningful gift.
